title: InterceptorResult
description: The observable outcome of a single interceptor within one request, as surfaced in the InterceptorContext / audit trail.

name.description: Unique interceptor name, e.g. pii_guard, audit, retry, timeout, fallback.

phase.description: Where the interceptor acted in the pipeline.

detail.description: Interceptor-specific signals (e.g. pii entity counts, retry attempts).
